title: Bioregenerative Life Support Systems (BLSS): Principles, Current Research, and Strategic Imperatives for Long-Duration Space Missions
description: This article provides a comprehensive analysis of Bioregenerative Life Support Systems (BLSS) as essential technologies for sustainable human presence in space. It explores the foundational ecological principles of these closed-loop systems, which integrate producers, consumers, and decomposers to regenerate oxygen, water, and food. The content examines current methodological approaches from international programs, addresses critical troubleshooting challenges for system optimization, and validates technologies through comparative analysis of ground-based and flight experiments.
audience: researchers, scientists, and technology development professionals
